infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HomeBase uses your camera to photograph your home, projects, and documents when submitting service requests or capturing job progress.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HomeBase accesses your photo library so you can attach photos of your home, projects, or documents to service requests and job records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: HomeBase saves photos related to your home projects and service records to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: HomeBase uses the microphone when recording video walkthroughs of your home or project areas to share with service providers.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HomeBase uses your location to find nearby service providers and verify service addresses.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: HomeBase accesses your contacts so you can quickly add clients or invite service providers without retyping their information.
